message:
🌱 Add thanos: Deduplication returning deduped and non-deduped results in mission (#778)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-6257-deduplication-returning-deduped-and-non-deduped-results-in-0-31-0",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: Deduplication returning deduped and non-deduped results in 0.31.0+",
+    "description": "Deduplication returning deduped and non-deduped results in 0.31.0+. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\n**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:\n\nThanos Version: 0.31.0\nPrometheus Version: 2.42.0\n\n**Object Storage Provider**:\n\nS3\n\n**What happened**:\n\nSlack Thread: https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/CK5RSSC10/p1680534545839619\n\nWe recently"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Deduplication returning deduped and non-deduped results in\u2026",
+        "description": "I believe this comes from the stores not re-ordering the series after adding the external labels. You can replicate it by adding the metrics:\n```\nmetric{}\nmetric{alocal=\"label\"}\n```\n\nAnd an external label `ext=\"label\"`. Before the external label, `metric{} < metric{alocal=\"label\"}` because it has\n```yaml\n- --query.replica-label=replica\n            - --query.replica-label=prometheus_replica\n            - --query.replica-label=cluster\n            - --query.replica-label=__replica__\n            - --query.replica-label=tenant_id\n            - --query.replica-label=receive\n            - --query.replica-label=prometheus\n            - --query.replica-label=thanos_ruler_replica\n            - --query.auto-downsampling\n            - --query.max-concurrent-select=25\n            - --store.response-timeout=1m\n            - --query.max-concurrent=500\n            - --query.metadata.default-time-range=6h\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Deduplication returning deduped and non-deduped\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I believe this comes from the stores not re-ordering the series after adding the external labels. You can replicate it by adding the metrics:\n```\nmetric{}\nmetric{alocal=\"label\"}\n```\n\nAnd an external label `ext=\"label\"`. Before the external label, `metric{} < metric{alocal=\"label\"}` because it has fewer labels.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- --query.replica-label=replica\n            - --query.replica-label=prometheus_replica\n            - --query.replica-label=cluster\n            - --query.replica-label=__replica__\n            - --query.replica-label=tenant_id\n            - --query.replica-label=receive\n            - --query.replica-label=prometheus\n            - --query.replica-label=thanos_ruler_replica\n            - --query.auto-downsampling\n            - --query.max-concurrent-select=25\n            - --store.response-timeout=1m\n            - --query.max-concurrent=500\n            - --query.metadata.default-time-range=6h",
+        "node_os_info{env=\"production\", id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-001.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\", receive_replica=\"0\", tenant_id=\"default-tenant\", version=\"7 (Core)\", version_id=\"7\"}\nnode_os_info{env=\"production\", id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-002.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\", receive_replica=\"0\", tenant_id=\"default-tenant\", version=\"7 (Core)\", version_id=\"7\"}\nnode_os_info{env=\"production-nl1\", id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-001.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\",",
+        "node_os_info{id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-001.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\", receive_replica=\"0\", tenant_id=\"default-tenant\", version=\"7 (Core)\", version_id=\"7\"}\nnode_os_info{id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-001.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\", receive_replica=\"0\", tenant_id=\"default-tenant\", version=\"7 (Core)\", version_id=\"7\"}\nnode_os_info{id=\"centos\", id_like=\"rhel fedora\", instance=\"hulbdcfr1-002.REDACTED:9106\", job=\"Node Exporter\", name=\"CentOS Linux\", pretty_name=\"CentOS Linux 7 (Core)\", receive_cluster=\"eu1\", receive_replica=\"0\", tenant_id=\"default-tenant\", version="
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",

+    ],
